textByHash.a46a584d9447ef9aebf2994e93a055ed65c6175f: Greetings adventurer. I am Phileas the Lumbridge Guide.
textByHash.b258e7aa2167930747daa151185c2393bb01ebde: Greetings Zanik! I am here to give information and directions to new players. Do you require any help?
textByHash.8cf838b0742615e3d425c24fdd83933ecdedfd93: I didn't have far to travel!
textByHash.ac3111955070da2adb0fc794d1e9690997798bbc: I think he's lost his Amulet of Manspeak.
textByHash.330ed910bf726d345d149a0ad93319456eed99aa: Not to worry. I found it again.
textByHash.9f1d352b4a32ac6b39a121a5b963e66130429eec: However, you'll need to make space for it before I can give it to you.
textByHash.3fa661cac4e1adb2209d53b661ee22458a191155: Greetings, adventurer. I am Phileas, the Lumbridge Guide. I am here to give information and directions to new players. Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHash.e2393fe5fb5d3061d0a4103ab13a412ef12be07d: I'm afraid I can't think of any more quests for you. Don't worry though, there'll be plenty more out there. You'll just need to find them.
textByHash.9e60e950d03881d54e70f6134e8f27a2428ad4bb: Is there anything else you need help with?
textByHash.63012baa75994d35f80dfbf8685ff1b25350102f: Well, I've heard my friend the cook is in need of a spot of help. He'll be in the kitchen of this here castle. Just talk to him and he'll set you off.
textByHash.158f14e624e0ff1d6b3481357bf3f7449ce39137: Well, I heard that Father Aereck could use a hand. You'll find him in the church just here. Talk to him and he'll give you the details.
textByHash.b012e8a6bd0b344dbf3dec233623c6cbde23e3cf: Well, I heard that a chap called Veos needs help finding some treasure. Last I heard, he was looking for assistance in the pub just north of here. Talk to him and see if you can help.
textByHash.3f50a2f5b786df41c53d3b08901e47a15ea3eca8: Well, I heard that Farmer Fred could use some help. You'll find him on the farm just north of here. Talk to him and see if he needs a hand.
textByHash.ca6d883425a2d28dcfcd3351ab42fa3a914bc138: Well, I heard there was some commotion in the swamp to the south. Might be worth looking into.
textByHash.15a21b23d7c395cf14ba38c5ec52721c3036c19b: Well, I believe the Duke of Lumbridge requires an errand running for him. You can find him upstairs in the castle. Just talk to him to get the details.
textByHash.e15dcb1e60d82f12ac9d22219483afb26a7b4f83: I heard you were already helping the cook. Are you sure you need another quest?
textByHash.529c756bf8b356c43b13f7389a22a2014c5d92f2: I heard you were already helping Father Aereck. Are you sure you need another quest?
textByHash.a516c38baa1f7850ae2767b4ab6d4d7ba021dfcc: I heard you were already helping Veos. Are you sure you need another quest?
textByHash.179489fb51a1598c3a3c0d2fe14a369a262ba3a7: I heard you were already helping Farmer Fred. Are you sure you need another quest?
textByHash.c3e94c2bbb7c6f71eb09e96a4e6a36dd540f7d1b: I heard you were already investigating the issue in the swamp. Are you sure you need another quest?
textByHash.85e480a85c2a3c545b4a79c7b5169f19d4c22ad7: I heard you were already helping the Duke. Are you sure you need another quest?
textByHash.1cebd0d70731eace366fc22d5f6be6d13df28130: Well if you need a reminder, try having a look at your quest journal.
textByHash.ac18cc405829cf1d9ce30cfe36606a102b96fbb7: It's going to be tough fighting monsters without a weapon. I suggest you find one of those first.
textByHash.bee85e352a427e0a6e159b02bb6dee520a6dfe51: Well you can either make them, find them or buy them.
textByHash.bf79da7829ac7ff9eddd63d5f4301056d477c5f5: If you visit the combat tutors south of the general store they may be able to help you with that. Failing that there are a few cheap weapons lying around in the world. For example, you can get an iron dagger if you
textByHash.ac8a5f1c969425427cf7429ee4a920b0970ceb0d: cross the bridge and look in the little hut where some goblins live. If it's not there it probably means someone else has taken it. If you wait a while a new one should appear. As you explore you may find other weapons,
textByHash.839574b7e6e1b2b49138fc66888b3df2917929d6: Well, what would you like to know?
textByHash.67162c6b36900c9cdd083cbed387dc5126a61fb9: You already have a reasonable Smithing level, so I think you know that already.
textByHash.1301ba3317f60550cadf2875339cac835e4f1545: The Smithing skill allows you to make armour and weapons. Talk to the boy who smelts metal in the furnace, I'm sure he can help.
textByHash.16ee9f3e3403b99211df9160c628373623195af3: You will find a helpful Smithing tutor in the west of Varrock - that's north of here. Follow the path across the river and head north.
textByHash.a32a71d2f6a5e2e39ebd53914f4195fbe80ef0f0: I suggest you go and mine some ore; find the Mining symbol - with the guide symbol near it - in the swamp south of here. The Mining guide there can teach you how to mine ore.
textByHash.899bff32db299e3d28cd7ad7ea8cdf67cc02d55a: You can get a weapon free from the combat tutors if they think you need it. Failing that, the nearest shop that would sell you something of that nature is Bob's Brilliant Axes in this very town. If you want a bigger
textByHash.6a119e282d80e8c1b74800354ae4a80fc0f2c3b3: choice I suggest you head to one of the big cities. If you follow the road east over the bridge and then head north you will eventually reach Varrock, where you can buy all manner of things. You can use the world map
textByHash.1b71b673c09ee5dfa5c9d25f67acd882ff06315c: to help you find your way.
textByHash.bd51a57f73b29dfcb7bdc740048068e72bc82b3e: There is no other staff like this in all the land. It's a very important staff. It shows who holds the job as the Lumbridge Guide, and that's me.
textByHash.83778c9510332d506b30fb43fbf3edc76aede7fd: There's lots of beasts to fight in the woods around here, especially to the west. There are certainly some goblins and spiders that are pests and could do with being cleared out. There's also a chicken farm or two up the
textByHash.5ab74a23d405e6a9c22c1d29939de6c88f3c72f1: road for some fairly easy pickings. Non-player characters usually appear as yellow dots on your minimap, although there are some that you won't be able to fight, such as myself. A monster's combat level is
textByHash.238cf70b15414597f83d56fd1fd22d8e28ec38f8: shown next to their 'Attack' option. If that level is coloured green it means the monster is weaker than you. If it is red, it means that the monster is tougher than you.
textByHash.43ea824483952d07798e394612f304a263007789: Remember, you will do better if you have better armour and weapons and it's always worth carrying a bit of food to heal yourself.
textByHash.a4f60534d8df264ab3f2611ebdef7e55e1be0c3f: There are many different foods in the game such as cabbage, fish, meat and many more. Which do you wish to hear about?
textByHash.299e7c99091d5b6657a20a5bd8a184687435edaf: There is a field a little distance to the north of here packed full of cabbages which are there for the picking.
textByHash.5c919b7c835b494bbe5f1e089a2867f46099fbb6: You could also farm your own cabbages; there's a Farming patch just south of Falador.
textByHash.c6e02e204c88be086ed5ca1d000482e622753b4c: I am confused. You are already an experienced fisher. You should know the answer to that already.
textByHash.3cafb863cba81803b869746e9670e6be37e7e692: Fishing spots require different levels and equipment to use. To start Fishing, you'll want to talk to the Fishing tutor who can be found in the swamps south of here. He will also give you a small fishing net if you don't
textByHash.614d3e8bb73e99a5e0aa697998de4da912e73eab: You can get them from a Fishing shop or our Fishing Tutor south of here in the swamp. There is a Fishing shop in Port Sarim; you can find it on the world map. Port Sarim is some way to the west of here, beyond
textByHash.f8b1f1b6fd25822fda463391a012135253444101: I suggest you go and kill some chickens. The roads on either side of this river eventually go past a chicken farm. When you have killed some chickens, cook them. You could either make a fire or use a range.
textByHash.cbdc95b02715d94e47ec32260f2a2c0a895e9180: There is a range at the southern end in this town and a Cooking tutor in south Lumbridge near Bob's Brilliant Axes shop.
textByHash.780d86fe5219b60bf199cba61e35a4123e9ab027: Well, you can make them, buy them or talk to the combat tutors just west of here.
textByHash.9b6c0d35ab5073e63873757f18a35f9068571460: Well, you can go to the Wilderness. That is the area for killing other players. Just keep heading north and eventually you will be bound to reach it. Be very careful, though. Player-killing is not for the unprepared.
textByHash.438b9be38d439d165edacd799f4e086ce19ce7cd: I'd suggest that you leave any items you don't want to lose in the bank and take a good supply of food with you.
textByHash.fa51a06bdb5af047a2082b0c2460a1ae148c85d5: You're strong enough to work out what monsters to fight for yourself now, but the combat tutors might help you with any questions you have about the skills; they're just over there to the south of the general store.
textByHash.bdfd7061964f1ccb5fc9fb483f9f4c11ba2a50d9: There are many ways to make money in the game. I would suggest either killing monsters or doing a trade skill such as Smithing or Fishing.
textByHash.8d59a285e9308515e20618c3434709fa6a5d4dc5: Please don't try to get money by begging off other players. It will make you unpopular. Nobody likes a beggar. It is very irritating to have other players asking for your hard-earned cash.
textByHash.37d361754d45057b09e24642c65e1adcb10a0289: What you'll want is the OSRS Wiki! I've taken the liberty of opening the useful links section of the account management tab for you. Here you can find a link to the wiki. There's information and guides on almost
textByHash.6cf101d721a3585cb7e164039e1ee9890df04c72: everything, all easily searched and it's even written and maintained by players.
textByHash.e4700ffa23a639a4828e617a6effaa6db5501c6e: First I must warn you to take every precaution to keep your RuneScape password and PIN secure. The most important thing to remember is to never give your password to, or share your account with, anyone.
textByHash.13b7cff1463ac18f9543fd40fe8bc7f3539c9d33: I can also tell you about password security, avoiding item scamming and in-game moderation. I can also tell you about a place called the Stronghold of Security, where you can learn more about account security and
textByHash.2a9550767dc45c085a30b1922f57add45b47c5f5: have a bit of an adventure at the same time.
textByHash.dd5aed493c9eb6b3c90b8794dd4779faf6e0d903: Well, the first thing to remember with password security, which I can't stress enough, is to never tell your password, bank PIN or authenticator details to anyone, not even if they claim to be Jagex staff. Real
textByHash.14349e8da048104d49648e937e210ba43005b4cb: Jagex staff will NEVER ask for your password. Sharing your account is a very bad idea, even if you think that you know and trust the person you are sharing with. Players have lost items and even their
textByHash.f0b08ea920cf76ff25ea6475b403f25489835302: account this way. Sharing accounts is also against the rules.
textByHash.e0655e441dcf94b57c39aff72f79ee9764f6692b: Yes, also be careful where you enter your password. Be aware that fake Old School RuneScape websites exist. These are sites that claim to give things such as item/stat upgrades, free items, beta testing and
textByHash.b6d2beca06d45482fc952a81d002004c2f805ab4: moderator applications. Jagex do not offer any of these services.
textByHash.aa9e839511e2d29cef12a9eba9d968b8715c96e7: Also be aware of trojans and keyloggers. These nasty programs can send everything you type into your device back to the computers of malicious people, so you can lose more than just your Old School RuneScape
textByHash.8c14af26f6818d909053486944673ce1b414a714: password in this way. To avoid getting these on your device, be very wary of what you download, especially when it comes to downloading third party software. Also be very wary of email attachments and instant
textByHash.01bae7a5e53a1cbd147c856c917be7a2b6d9e599: messenger file transfers, which can contain such things.
textByHash.9083586e3ae46e840a8d58b98b368825a5e30d67: Finally, remember the game doesn't censor your password or bank PIN when you type them; anyone who tells you otherwise is probably trying to steal your character or items.
textByHash.7582e99025d0054d930aaaed4afc0279d9b4a318: There are many nice and helpful players in Old School RuneScape; unfortunately, as in real life, there are some who aren't so honest. Some people may try to trick you out of your items. Try not to fall for this as
textByHash.d9c4f57363e1b4cbaef9fcd1d953b58cdf2c06a6: Jagex policy is to never return lost items to players that have been scammed. Doing so just encourages users to claim they lost items they never had to gain an unfair advantage. However, people carrying out such
textByHash.6d407aaf640c7717310a668104902d0afcfb3ea7: scams will get banned as it is against the rules.
textByHash.8335309b2b1f39c61381cae2f091924b509de981: When trading, you have a second trade confirmation screen. Always double check that you are getting the items you expect on this page as some people may try and change what they are trading at the last minute on
textByHash.5492a419d83fa73eef3a8f80198590921596a62e: the first trade screen. Remember when you have clicked accept on the second trade screen, the trade is not reversible.
textByHash.768646ee308ffaab6833e3385bd511e5fc9d0ab0: Try and find out from someone else what an item is before spending a lot of money on it. Not all merchants are honest about the rarity or the uses of their wares. For example, some people try to pass off spinach rolls as
textByHash.34446068c27abd8f413fbd06ca31b0250f4914aa: rare when in fact they're as common as cabbages!
textByHash.a59006aeab7ee195e91b3ceab6febe3c3870b2b4: Be wary of people offering to improve your items. For example, some people will claim they can add a trim to your armour or upgrade your sword to a more powerful one. This is not possible and they are trying
textByHash.30f893be16399f41aebce9c799f20d3532a36c82: You will, from time to time, see moderator characters in game. Remember: a real staff member will never ask for your password or any other personal information. There are two types of moderator. You may see Jagex
textByHash.71092894b69ef675b09e5ed07fdb3bc0fca25ef4: staff characters in game - these can be identified by a gold crown next to their name and are the people who work in the Jagex offices. They might be from Customer Support, or they might be a tester or a
textByHash.81a0ecf589f33908b04d87839763bc4bf5d2a67b: programmer. You may also see player moderators - these can be identified by a silver crown next to their name. Player moderators are trusted players of Old School RuneScape that help keep in-game behaviour in
textByHash.75d15c239139f1b734ea3ed1989d58d4d20f03c0: line with the Old School RuneScape rules.
textByHash.369767697cc3cce530d25fa4310c6ac7f83d22e6: The only way to become a player moderator is to know and play by the rules laid down by Jagex. Report those who break the rules, help players who need it and one day you might find an invite to become a moderator in
textByHash.d8329357438068de00145f8dbdf254b379542118: your Old School RuneScape inbox. Note that Jagex will never contact you in game or by email to become a player moderator.
textByHash.e2f29042859f92d6b2530744d1cb4481ff9b0e6a: An exciting new discovery has been made in the Barbarian Village. Soon after they started mining in the middle of the village, one of the miners got caught in a cave.
textByHash.7b5ce30efdf183b88b72d0160d2f74da9f045be5: No, but it turned out that he had discovered a place unlike any other.
textByHash.7986c97f8e6ec94f9a24a7548b61307416cdf4c0: Well an explorer went to look down there, it's full of new and exciting creatures and other surprises on top of that. It turns out this place can also help you to secure your account more effectively.
textByHash.d6c14446cb8a96cd78ca1ffe6f24a4d2134b4fe7: Sadly the explorer went missing and has not been found. However, here is some information to get you started on securing your account. You can find the Barbarian Village north of Falador and west of Varrock.
textByHash.b86d6070a0247ad39f700d839dd804871085006e: You'll find a bank upstairs in Lumbridge Castle - go right to the top.
textByHash.f2a8468368599b21e5c4e3e18fada8ca2072a680: Okay, okay! I'm sorry, I'll never do it again!
textByHash.95c2d295bef3018d06637ea547d1d5843881e01a: I'm supposed to be the local source of knowledge, but I cannot even solve this puzzle! Do me a favour and solve it for me.
textByHash.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
textByHash.33f7441055d4038b646497cfaeb4f9083388c65b: That locket! Where did you get it?
textByHash.1680b27d1d4812198d06fdf339eced75b3b270e7: Not exactly... It's a long and sad story.
textByHash.ace0cfdf40d0915a6ecadc7cdc9dae2793e19deb: It all started in my youth when I was part of the Order of Wizards. I frequently spent time travelling across Gielinor, which kept me away from my beloved who worked here in Lumbridge.
textByHash.3129c44af1173ff787e7c6f4c6d6f93f3df08a63: Due to being apart, I would often send her gifts. This locket was one of them.
textByHash.651a091eb59c5a870abc222d1f6a3d55dca54e40: As I said, my research often kept me away from home. During one of my trips away, our house was robbed. My dear Thenia tried to stop them, but they took her life in return. The locket was taken in the robbery.
textByHash.7f4f68951a13a4f20f3d654c87819e9c3a5663e2: I appreciate your kind words, but this was a long time ago. The pain of losing a loved one never fades, but in time you come to live with it.
textByHash.fedcf7160b9796c8e5cccf4a0a6a58bbb308fd94: Anyway, after that I stepped down from the Order of Wizards. I now spend my days offering guidance to those who come through Lumbridge.
textByHash.2b1032d4d3e712d1fea2479aafe384b023ca22f4: The Abyss? I wasn't aware anyone had ever been to the Abyss.
textByHash.25c8cad215948ead9bbc9f737149b56dc05cbcb6: The Z.M.I.? But could that mean...
textByHash.cb419445c9f223af43e633cbddc2b41debed98b1: Oh, nothing to worry about. Just me being a silly old man. Tell me more about this temple.
textByHash.302ef59335d9479f25ba608032c4a6ac8ef48cd9: Only stories, of which there are very few. Still, I always believed them to be real. After all, why else would an eye be the symbol of the Order of Wizards?
textByHash.62a19672e088cd5466445f50e991b11fbf744b84: Ah, but that reminds me, I was not the first in my family to join the order. This amulet was passed down from generation to generation.
textByHash.70287f0e83dfcfc0f014e42f8af43d8fcf29ce51: As soon as you mentioned it, I wondered if there might be a connection.
textByHash.2d9cc022e71714ac8f83da9af6cf0e2d938f1451: The origin of this amulet was something I spent much time puzzling over when I was younger. I'm glad you have answered the question I couldn't.
textByHash.1ea317ecf4bf46568af9b6099aead4b5842dc55a: I'd be happy to give you this amulet in return for that locket. I have no use for it, but that locket is something which holds a lot of sentimental value to me.
textByHash.8e0b6d8027b7f928ae0d47ca8cc01b9a7ddf97ef: Thank you for returning this to me. I wish you the best of luck on the rest of your adventures.
textByHash.b956cb742b7de6fe816cade9843a5c2f40e480a4: Oh, I see. I guess I can't really force you to hand it over. The offer still stands if you ever change your mind.
textByHash.5502264a81a455e1f09e4f2146261a97f5b64c43: You're back. Would you consider giving me that locket? It holds a lot of sentimental value to me. I'll give you that amulet in return.
